name: provekit-protocol
_unsigned: draft v1.1.0; minor bump for: (1) property memento role replaced by contract memento (pre/post/inv/outBinding); (2) implication memento role added (with Z3 witness body); (3) handshake algorithm spec added; (4) IR formal grammar maximal-uniformity cut (flat quantifiers, unified connective with operands, no sort on var/ctor, name everywhere). Spec CIDs marked RECOMPUTE will be derived from the canonical bytes after the implementation cut lands; the catalog itself signs after that.
_breakingChanges: Property memento role removed; contract memento role added with body fields {pre?, post?, inv?, outBinding, preHash?, postHash?, invHash?, authoring}
Implication memento role added; minted by verifiers when Z3 discharges (Q implies P) at handshake time

IR-JSON shape: forall/exists are flat (no Lambda wrapper); and/or/not/implies use unified `operands` array; var and ctor terms drop `sort`; atomic uses `name` instead of `predicate`; `name` replaces `varName` everywhere
All previously-derived propertyHashes are invalidated by the IR shape change; cross-language demos and PoCs re-derive CIDs
legacy-witness wrapper variant removed; producers MUST emit role-specific variants only
